response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, including C++ experience, but their recent focus has shifted toward full-stack and AI-related work in TypeScript/Node.js. While they meet some core requirements (e.g., C++, networking, multi-threading), their direct experience with industrial automation, secure coding (IEC 62443), and cloud platforms (Azure) is limited or outdated.
strengths: Extensive C++ experience, including work on NI LabWindows/CVI and real-time systems.
Strong background in networking, multi-threading, and event-driven architectures (e.g., GIS platform, DLang projects).
Proven leadership in mentoring, technical documentation, and open-source contributions (e.g., workshops, talks, and tooling).
concerns: Recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and AI, with minimal focus on C++ or industrial automation.
Lack of explicit experience with IEC 62443 or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
No mention of Azure cloud services or industrial protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) in recent work.

key_factors.factor: Shift away from C++ to full-stack/AI
